leadText: The Adamant Orb (Japanese: こんごうだま Diamond Orb) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Steel-type moves when held by Dialga. It is one of the orbs associated with the Pokémon of myth.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by Dialga , it increases the power of its Dragon - and Steel-type moves by 20%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Platinum , it is required to encounter Dialga at Spear Pillar .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by Dialga , it increases the power of its Dragon - and Steel-type moves by 20%.
